mapper.select: SELECT id, receiver_id AS receiverId, target_url AS targetUrl, type, title, message, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{id} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification ( receiver_id, target_url, type, title, message, is_read, created_at ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{targetUrl}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{isRead}, NOW() )
